description: Self-IP Agency cron configuration template. Fill WORKSPACE_PATH after install.

jobs.name: main-heartbeat
jobs.description: Main orchestrator heartbeat — checks TAS, dispatches sub-agents
jobs.command_template: cd {{WORKSPACE_PATH}} && ./scripts/dev-claude.sh "Read runtime/main/task.json and execute heartbeat cycle. Update runtime/main/heartbeat.json."

jobs.name: bookmarker-cycle
jobs.command_template: cd {{WORKSPACE_PATH}} && ./scripts/dev-claude.sh "Read runtime/bookmarker/task.json and execute social curation cycle. Update runtime/bookmarker/result.json."

jobs.name: trader-cycle
jobs.command_template: cd {{WORKSPACE_PATH}} && ./scripts/dev-claude.sh "Read runtime/trader/task.json and execute trade cycle. Update runtime/trader/result.json."

openclaw_cron_commands: openclaw cron add main-heartbeat '*/10 * * * *' '{{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/dev-claude.sh "Read runtime/main/task.json and execute heartbeat cycle."'
openclaw cron add bookmarker-cycle '*/30 * * * *' '{{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/dev-claude.sh "Read runtime/bookmarker/task.json and execute social curation cycle."'
openclaw cron add trader-cycle '0 * * * *' '{{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/dev-claude.sh "Read runtime/trader/task.json and execute trade cycle."'
